textify(cN||(cN=(0,et.Z)(["Walking through the deep forest finally brings you to an opening in the canopy where you can see the [dayNight|suns|stars]. A small, blue lake stretches out in front of you, catching the light. It’s unusually quiet here. There are few animals in evidence despite the calm, just a handful of birds keeping their distance on the other side of the water. It’s enough to give you the feeling you aren’t alone. But nothing comes lunging for you, no ambush is waiting in the brush. After a few tense moments, you let out a breath and resume walking. Perhaps whatever spooked the wildlife already left. A minute later, you find the first sign of what came before you. There’s a hollow under one of the trees, only visible now that you’re passing by it. A number of soiled rags and scraps of cloth are scattered around the culvert, and the fresh scents of the forest are starting to give way to a rancid musk that [pc.isBimbo|kind of makes your mouth water|makes your nose curl]. After all you’ve been through on your adventures, you recognize the scent of sexual excess anywhere. A whole hell of a lot of it, clinging thickly to the discarded garments. Some of them look familiar. Bits of a poncho, a red vest... a tattered cowboy hat with several bulletholes through it. Your cousin came through here. Guess [rival.heShe] got away after all. You shouldn’t be surprised. You see Johana’s pistol down in the bottom of the hollow, but its charge cell is missing and the barrel’s been bent, like somebody used it as a club over some particularly thick skulls. You squat down and examine the mess here. There’s a lot jizz, torn hair, a little blood... looks like [rival.name] escaped from a real party. ... But [rival.heShe] escaped alone. There’s only one set of footprints coming here, and they’re definitely your cousin’s size. If [rival.heShe] brought Johana’s pistol and hat, there’s a pretty good chance that the Creeds are still back with the hyraxi warriors. Good riddance, but a damn shame the one you really wanted to get rid of managed to get away. Finally, your cousin got a bodyguard that’s worth her price, you guess. You follow the footsteps with your gaze, deeper into the forest. Looks like [rival.name] headed west."])))
